name: 18_Image_Enhancement_SRGAN_DIV2K_DL
query: Nahitaji kuunda mfumo wa kuboresha picha kwa kutumia mfano wa SRGAN (unaweza kupata SRGAN iliyofunzwa awali [hapa](https://github.com/tensorlayer/srgan)) na seti ya data ya DIV2K, ambayo inaweza kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://data.vision.ee.ethz.ch/cvl/DIV2K/). Seti ya data inapaswa kupakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`. Mfumo unapaswa kusindika picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia mfano uliyojifunza awali uliowekwa chini ya `models/saved_models/` kuokoa muda, na hifadhi picha zilizoboreshwa kwenye saraka ya `results/figures/`. Aidha, mfumo unapaswa kuonyesha na kuhifadhi kulinganisha kati ya picha za asili na zilizoboreshwa kwenye `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png`. Hatimaye, unda ripoti ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo kwenye seti tofauti za sampuli ili kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano kwenye aina mbalimbali za picha, na ihifadhi kama `results/report.md`. Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha kulinganisha kwa kina kwa utendaji wa mfano kwenye sampuli hizi zilizochaguliwa, ikionyesha pale ambapo mfano unafanya vizuri au unapata changamoto.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "DIV2K" imepakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa "SRGAN" uliyojifunza awali umehifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.
Usindikaji wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, umetekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Picha zilizoboreshwa zimehifadhiwa kwenye folda maalum `results/figures/`.
Kulinganisha kwa picha za asili na zilizoboreshwa kunaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png`.
Faili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Seti tofauti za sampuli zinapaswa kuchaguliwa ili kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano kwenye aina mbalimbali za picha.
Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha kulinganisha kwa kina kwa utendaji wa mfano kwenye sampuli hizi zilizochaguliwa, ikionyesha pale ambapo mfano unafanya vizuri au unapata changamoto.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "DIV2K" imepakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the DIV2K dataset. It only contains a placeholder function `load_dataset()` that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`, and a `build_transforms()` function returning a static list. There is no real implementation of downloading, reading, or processing the DIV2K dataset (e.g., no use of `torchvision.datasets`, no file path handling for DIV2K images, no actual data loading logic). The file merely lists DIV2K as a keyword in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` without implementing the actual functionality.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "SRGAN" uliyojifunza awali umehifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The project structure shows that the `models/saved_models/` directory exists but is empty — no SRGAN model files (e.g., `.pth`, `.pt`, `.h5`, or similar) are saved there. Additionally, the `src/data_loader.py` file is merely a placeholder with no actual SRGAN training or model-saving logic. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no steps related to saving or loading an SRGAN model under `models/saved_models/` were found.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, umetekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual image preprocessing (resizing and normalization). It only contains placeholder functions:

- `load_dataset()` returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no real data loading logic.
- `build_transforms()` returns a simple list of strings `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` — not actual transform operations using libraries like `torchvision.transforms`, `PIL`, or `cv2`.

There is no real implementation of image resizing (e.g., `transforms.Resize(...)`) or normalization (e.g., `transforms.Normalize(mean, std)`). The file explicitly describes itself as a "Minimal semantic implementation" and "placeholder," confirming that the required functionality is absent.

judge_stats.criteria: Picha zilizoboreshwa zimehifadhiwa kwenye folda maalum `results/figures/`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

The project structure clearly shows that the `results/figures/` directory exists and contains a file named `enhanced_comparison.png`. This directly satisfies the requirement that enhanced images are saved in the designated `results/figures/` folder. The file `enhanced_comparison.png` is visible in the project tree under `results\figures\`, confirming that at least one enhanced image has been stored in the correct location.

judge_stats.criteria: Kulinganisha kwa picha za asili na zilizoboreshwa kunaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png` exists in the project structure, but its content shows an error rather than a valid image. The error message indicates: `"The image was specified using the image/jpeg media type, but the image appears to be a image/png image"` — meaning the file could not be read/verified as a valid comparison image. Additionally, the trajectory evidence confirms there is no recorded evidence of successful creation or saving of this comparison file. Therefore, the requirement to display and save a comparison of original and enhanced images has not been properly fulfilled.

judge_stats.criteria: Faili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/report.md` exists in the workspace, but its content is merely `('placeholder', None)` — this is not a valid Markdown report with results and illustrations. A proper report should contain meaningful analysis, metrics, findings, and references to figures (such as `enhanced_comparison.png`). The file appears to be an unfilled placeholder rather than a completed Markdown document.
